studioPipeline.description: Manage showroom and field team leads: stages, industries, and contact emails. This quarter’s closed revenue on your book: {revenue}. Overlapping target total: {target}.
studioPipeline.descriptionNoTarget: not set — add dated targets in Settings
studioPipeline.searchAria: Search pipeline by business, contact, owner, or email
studioPipeline.dupTitle: Same company name appears more than once in this list

importIssues.READ_FAILED: Could not read file (invalid CSV or Excel).
importIssues.NEED_HEADER_ROW: Need a header row plus at least one data row.
importIssues.NO_COLUMNS: No recognized columns. Use the first row from the downloaded template (English column names).
importIssues.COMPANY_SIZE_INVALID: Company size must be one of: {allowed}.
importIssues.ACCOUNT_STATUS_INVALID: Account status must be one of: {allowed}.

bulkImportDialog.title: Bulk import pipeline
bulkImportDialog.description: Upload a CSV or Excel file (.csv, .xlsx). The first sheet’s first row must be headers. Required column: business_name (or business / company). Industry can be any sector label (1–{maxIndustry} characters). Stage and account status must match the app’s allowed values (see template). Column names stay in English so imports stay reliable.
bulkImportDialog.rowsReady: {count} valid row(s) ready to insert as your owned leads.
bulkImportDialog.templateNote: Template columns match the New lead form (plus optional credit fields).

prospectForm.intro: Waryt Furniture runs sales by showroom and field teams—log each lead with the business or account name, contact person, and email so activities and follow-ups stay clear for your team.
prospectForm.businessHint: Storefront, showroom, or company label—shown together with the contact person on pipeline and prospect views.
prospectForm.teamHint: Tie this lead to a showroom or field team you belong to—managers use it for coverage and reporting.
prospectForm.noTeamHint: You are not on any team yet. Ask an admin to add you to a team, or continue without a team tag.
prospectForm.industryOtherHint: Saved as the industry label for this lead (up to {max} characters). Leave blank to keep the generic “Other” tag.
prospectForm.deleteDescription: {name} will be deleted permanently — for example when you accidentally created a duplicate company card. Linked studio activities are removed with it; sales log rows keep history but unlink from this account. This cannot be undone. If you do not own this row, the remove action may be blocked by access rules.
prospectForm.deleteHintBefore: If this card is the extra duplicate you do not need, use
prospectForm.deleteHintAfter: at the bottom of this form (only when you are allowed to delete this row).
prospectForm.dupBlockedTitle: This lead cannot be created (duplicate company)
prospectForm.dupSimilarTitle: Similar company already in the pipeline
prospectForm.dupMatchCount: {count} match(es) for this business name (same spelling, ignoring extra spaces).
prospectForm.dupBlockedBody: As taskforce, new leads must use a unique company name. Adjust the name or ask a manager if this should be merged with an existing card.
prospectForm.dupOthersBody: Some are owned by other teammates — coordinate before creating another card.
prospectForm.dupOwnBody: These rows are already on your pipeline — you may be duplicating your own entry.
prospectForm.teamDisplayUnknown: Pick a team from the list
